title: Uri Geller’s meeting with Werner Von Braun!

transcript.text: Dr ven Brown wants to meet me
grandfather of the Space Program new he
was a Nazi well yeah I mean but he was a
rocket genius my curiosity killed me I
said let's go verer pulls out a piece of
metal and he says to me URI touch this
tell me what you feel I put my fingers
on it and I say wow it doesn't feel like
it's from here then he says come with me
do you see this door behind him ver
Brown takes me into his personal office
there's a safe in the office he opens a
safe I see a piece of metal I've never
seen such a color pulls it out it's not
heavy says URI touch this tell me what
you feel now I put my hand on it and I
say verer this is not from here he says
you're right this is a piece of a UFO
that crashed on our planet you know I'm
mind blown because as a child I used to
sneak into movie theaters in Tel Aviv to
see films on extraterrestrial life and
this is coming from the mouth of verer V
Brown
